title: Gittensory - Codex usage (self-host)
description: Codex review observability for the self-hosted stack. Prometheus panels are subscription-CLI attempt counters for the selected range; durable review records come from ai_usage_events, filtered by provider='codex' (migration 0109), and must be read with their status. Token/cost columns are populated whenever the Codex CLI reports real usage; estimated_neurons is a heuristic budget proxy, not billing-grade accounting.

panels.title: Reported cost
panels.description: USD cost reported by Codex JSON/JSONL output in the selected range, if available. Subscription CLIs may not emit this.

panels.title: CLI attempts
panels.description: Codex CLI attempts in the selected range. Failed or timed-out attempts can still appear here.

panels.title: Reported CLI tokens
panels.description: Tokens reported by Codex CLI output in the selected range. This is not billing-grade cost accounting.

panels.title: Successful review records
panels.description: Durable Codex-attributed ai_review_pr records with status=ok.

targets.queryText: SELECT count(*) AS reviews FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND status = 'ok' AND provider = 'codex'
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT count(*) AS reviews FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND status = 'ok' AND provider = 'codex'

panels.title: CLI attempts by model and effort
Durable token usage by day
panels.description: Real input/output tokens from ai_usage_events (migration 0109), populated when the Codex CLI reports usage. Replaces the old estimated-neuron-only proxy for this panel.

targets.queryText: SELECT date(created_at) AS time, sum(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, sum(output_tokens) AS output_tokens FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND provider = 'codex' GROUP BY date(created_at) ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(created_at) AS time, sum(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, sum(output_tokens) AS output_tokens FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND provider = 'codex' GROUP BY date(created_at) ORDER BY time

targets.queryText: SELECT status, count(*) AS count FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND provider = 'codex' GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT status, count(*) AS count FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND provider = 'codex' GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Durable cost by day
panels.description: Real USD cost from ai_usage_events (migration 0109), populated when the Codex CLI reports a cost field.

targets.queryText: SELECT date(created_at) AS time, sum(cost_usd) AS cost_usd FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND provider = 'codex' GROUP BY date(created_at) ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(created_at) AS time, sum(cost_usd) AS cost_usd FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND provider = 'codex' GROUP BY date(created_at) ORDER BY time

targets.queryText: SELECT created_at, model, effort, status, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, cost_usd, estimated_neurons, detail, json_extract(metadata_json, '$.repoFullName') AS repo, json_extract(metadata_json, '$.pullNumber') AS pr FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND provider = 'codex' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT created_at, model, effort, status, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, cost_usd, estimated_neurons, detail, json_extract(metadata_json, '$.repoFullName') AS repo, json_extract(metadata_json, '$.pullNumber') AS pr FROM ai_usage_events WHERE feature = 'ai_review_pr' AND provider = 'codex' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
